Uses of Class
microui.component.MenuButton

Packages that use MenuButton
Package
Description
microui.component
 

  • Uses of MenuButton in microui.component

    Methods in microui.component that return MenuButton
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.add(int... number)
    Adds plain items with numeric titles to the menu.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.add(String... title)
    Adds plain items (non-menu buttons) to the menu.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.add(String title, Listener onClickListener)
    Adds a plain item with a click listener to the menu.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.add(String title, processing.core.PImage icon, Listener onClickListener)
    Adds a plain item with an icon and click listener to the menu.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.addMenu(String menuTitle, String... itemTitle)
    Adds a sub-menu to the menu with the specified items.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.addMenu(String menuTitle, processing.core.PImage icon, String... itemTitles)
    Adds a sub-menu with an icon and items to the menu.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.close()
    Closes the menu.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.findMenu(String title)
    Finds a menu button by its title, searching recursively.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.findMenu(String title, boolean recursive)
    Finds a menu button by its title, optionally searching recursively.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.findMenuById(int id)
    Finds a menu button by its ID, searching recursively.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.findMenuById(int id, boolean recursive)
    Finds a menu button by its ID, optionally searching recursively.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.findMenuByTextId(String title)
    Finds a menu button by its text ID, searching recursively.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.findMenuByTextId(String title, boolean recursive)
    Finds a menu button by its text ID, optionally searching recursively.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.getMenu(String title)
    Gets a menu button by its title, searching recursively.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.getMenu(String title, boolean recursive)
    Gets a menu button by its title, optionally searching recursively.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.getMenuById(int id)
    Gets a menu button by its ID, searching recursively.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.getMenuById(int id, boolean recursive)
    Gets a menu button by its ID, optionally searching recursively.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.getMenuByTextId(String textId)
    Gets a menu button by its text ID, searching recursively.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.getMenuByTextId(String textId, boolean recursive)
    Gets a menu button by its text ID, optionally searching recursively.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.open()
    Opens the menu.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.remove(String... titles)
    Removes items by their titles.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.removeById(int... ids)
    Removes items by their IDs.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.removeByTextId(String... textIds)
    Removes items by their text IDs.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.setArrowColor(AbstractColor color, boolean recursive)
    Sets the color of the arrow indicator for sub-menus.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.setDirectionMode(MenuButton.DirectionMode directionMode)
    Sets the direction mode for sub-menu placement.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.setIcon(processing.core.PImage icon, String title)
    Sets an icon for a specific item in the menu.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.setItemHeight(float height)
    Sets the height for all items in this menu.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.setItemHeightRecursive(float height)
    Sets the height for all items in this menu and recursively in sub-menus.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.setItemsBackgroundColor(AbstractColor color, boolean recursive)
    Sets the background color for all items in this menu.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.setItemSize(float width, float height)
    Sets the size for all items in this menu.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.setItemSizeRecursive(float width, float height)
    Sets the size for all items in this menu and recursively in sub-menus.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.setItemsShadow(AbstractShadow shadow)
    Sets the shadow effect for the menu items.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.setItemsTextColor(AbstractColor color, boolean recursive)
    Sets the text color for all items in this menu.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.setItemWidth(float width)
    Sets the width for all items in this menu.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.setItemWidthRecursive(float width)
    Sets the width for all items in this menu and recursively in sub-menus.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.setOpen(boolean isOpen)
    Opens or closes the menu.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.setOpenStateIndicatorColor(AbstractColor color)
    Sets the color of the open state indicator.
